FoRecoML

The goal of FoRecoML is to …

Installation

You can install the development version of FoRecoML from GitHub with:

# install.packages("pak")
pak::pak("danigiro/FoRecoML")

Example

This is a basic example which shows you how to solve a common problem:

#library(FoRecoML)
## basic example code

Code of Conduct

Please note that the FoRecoML project is released with a Contributor Code of Conduct. By contributing to this project, you agree to abide by its terms.
